question:
Will Newcastle United Jets FC win on 2025-11-09?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 9, 2025
If Newcastle United Jets FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.a-league.com.au/

evidences.title: Implied Probability Calculator
evidences.content: The implied probability calculator helps bettors compare the implied probability of a betting market against the actual “fair” probability of that market. Implied Probability is a percentage that is derived by converting the given betting odds that represent the likelihood of that outcome occurring. This percentage factors in the bookmaker’s profit margin as well. One way to use implied probability with betting odds is to compare the implied probability of a betting market against the actual “fair” probability of that market – without the juice or vig baked in. If we find that the offered implied probability is lower than the fair probability (based on the no-vig line), then we’ve officially located the all-elusive bet we want to take – a bet with Positive Expected Value! Obviously, we [...] to take – a bet with Positive Expected Value! Obviously, we all want to bet on ‘winners’ but much more importantly we ONLY want to bet on teams where the implied odds are either lower or accurately represent the chance of that team winning. The key to locating valuable betting opportunities is finding an actual winning probability that is greater than or equal to the implied winning probabil...

evidences.content: ### Odds Calculator: Converting and Analyzing Odds The Odds Calculator is an essential tool for any serious player. It allows you to convert odds between different formats (decimal, fractional, and American) and calculate the implied probability of an event. This helps you determine whether the odds offered by Pinnacle represent good value based on your own analysis. For instance, if you’re evaluating a bet with odds of +175, the Odds Calculator shows that the implied probability is 36.4% (100/(100+175)). If your research suggests a 40% probability, the bet offers positive expected value. ### Arbitrage Calculator: Securing Guaranteed Profits [...] Consider a scenario where the Toronto Raptors are listed at odds of +200 to win a game. The implied probability here is 33.3% (100/100+200)). If your calculations, based on factors like player performance, team dynamics, and historical matchups, suggest a higher probability, placing this bet could yield a strong return. ### Baseball betting: A Growing Market Baseball may be traditionally American, but it has a solid following in Canada, especially with the Toronto Blue Jays as a focal point. evidences.title: Betfair Beta-Testing Updated Exchange Interface 'Betfair Predicts'
evidences.content: The company left the U.K. for low-tax Gibraltar in 2011 but quickly returned. It has maintained operating licenses since March 2015. Betfair's history with the UKGC is part of why it believes it is "best placed" to offer a platform for prediction markets to U.K. customers. Owned by Flutter Entertainment, Betfair assisted FanDuel with technical advice during the launch of FanDuel Predicts in the U.S. last year. The Betfair Exchange has proved to be quite fruitful, tracking £84 billion ($112.9 million) in trades during 2025. That marked an annual improvement of roughly 10%. ## Prediction platforms in UK The idea behind contract trading is "to offer a simpler, more intuitive way for customers to engage with prediction-style markets," Betfair notes on its website. [...] Trading on Betfair Exchange is different from wagering on the Betfair Sportsbook. Customers purchase contracts based on "Yes" and "No" outcomes in specific markets that are real-time reflections of customer sentiment, whereas sportsbook bettors wager against house-made odds. The company noted that the future course of the platform will depend on the customer response. It also stated trader feedback shows demand in th...
